overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a cyberpunk-style indoor commercial space with vibrant green and yellow neon lighting. The character walks through a ground floor lounge area with seated NPCs, ascends a metal staircase beneath a 'MADAME SAUVAGE'S PLACE' sign, and approaches a futuristic vehicle parked on an upper mezzanine level.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk lounge ground floor with seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the ground floor corridor toward the back wall, passing by seated patrons

notable_agents.action: seated at a table near the railing, appearing to relax or socialize

entered.detail: metal safety railing of the overhead walkway visible against the green-lit ceiling
pair of closed elevator doors at the end of the corridor
round tables with chairs where NPCs are seated along the right wall
large illuminated yellow sign reading MADAME SAUVAGE'S PLACE on the left wall
gridded metal floor tiles covering the ground surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a neon-lit cyberpunk lounge on the ground floor. Green and yellow artificial lighting illuminates the space, with an upper mezzanine visible overhead. NPCs sit at tables on the right side while the character approaches a large illuminated sign at the back.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal staircase ascending to upper mezzanine

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending the illuminated metal staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the open-riser metal stairs toward the upper mezzanine level

entered.detail: steep metal staircase with green neon lighting on the tread edges

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward a metal staircase bathed in green neon light and begins climbing. The large yellow sign is now alongside the stairs, and the ground floor seating area falls out of view as the ascent continues toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper mezzanine workshop with futuristic vehicle

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the upper workshop area

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper mezzanine toward a parked futuristic vehicle near a workbench

entered.detail: sleek silver sports car with illuminated elements parked on the mezzanine floor
metal workbench with equipment and a chair positioned next to the vehicle

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the upper level, the scene opens into a workshop area overlooking the floor below. A futuristic silver vehicle sits parked near a workbench, and the character approaches it while walking along the mezzanine railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk lounge that ascends into a futuristic upper-level workshop. It begins on the ground floor, gliding past NPCs seated at tables under a wash of green and yellow artificial light while moving toward a large illuminated sign. As the character turns, the camera follows the ascent up a metal staircase bathed in green neon, causing the seating area below to gradually fall out of view. The scene then opens onto a mezzanine level overlooking the lounge, shifting the perspective toward a workshop environment. Finally, the camera tracks along the railing toward a silver futuristic vehicle parked beside a workbench.
